pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly use this path for the VeraCrypt volume
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly use this path for the candidate keyfiles
export_result.sh explicitly checks for the volume being mounted at this path
export_result.sh checks for the recovered token at this path
export_result.sh checks for the correct keyfile name at this path

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on dynamically generated synthetic data, building a VeraCrypt volume and populating it with random python scripts as keyfile candidates. All output and input paths specified in the metadata (volume_path, candidates_dir, mount_point, output_token_path, output_keyname_path) have been verified to match the setup and export scripts.
